payload.label: dining table
payload.long_description: Reddish-brown wooden rectangular dining table with a glossy, slightly worn surface and carved apron; the front edge is partially cut off by the crop and matching carved chairs are visible around it — table appears medium-sized (seating ~6) and is approximately 1.2 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"dining table","short_description":"reddish-brown wooden table edge-cropped","long_description":"Reddish-brown wooden rectangular dining table with a glossy, slightly worn surface and carved apron; the front edge is partially cut off by the crop and matching carved chairs are visible around it — table appears medium-sized (seating ~6) and is approximately 1.2 m from the camera.","attributes":["reddish-brown wood","rectangular top","glossy finish","edge wear/scuffs","carved apron/ornate edge","partial/edge-cropped","matching carved chairs visible","medium size (~seats 6)"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
